title: Prabhat Kumar - The Fearless Adventurer | Skill-Wanderer
description: Meet Prabhat Kumar, a fearless DevOps learner from India who completed his mentorship in under 2 months. Discover his bold journey of pushing beyond boundaries.
plainText:
← Back to Our Learners 🧭 The Fearless Adventurer Prabhat Kumar The Fearless Adventurer 📍 India 💼 DevOps 🔗 LinkedIn A Bold Beginning I met this adventurer when he enrolled and claimed to already know Kubernetes , AWS , and Docker — which is quite impressive by itself for a Computer Science undergraduate. Even though there was still a lot of knowledge he was lacking, the confidence and ambition behind that claim immediately caught my attention. 🌟 The Eccentric Explorer However, what was even more impressive than his initial knowledge was his eccentricity. Prabhat always refused to simply follow instructions on how to do things the safe and simple way. Instead, he relentlessly pushed beyond into uncharted territory. 🗺️ Into Uncharted Territory Most of the time, the wild territory ended up biting him — things would break, configurations would fail, and debugging sessions would stretch long into the night. But that's the good part: he learned a lot, and so quickly . ⚡ Jaw-Dropping Speed Prabhat finished the entire DevOps mentorship in under 2 months — a jaw-dropping pace that speaks to his fearless approach and relentless drive to learn by doing, no matter how many times the path fought back. 🏗️ Proving Himself in the Real World Prabhat is currently working with our partner MindyCore to gain more experience and adventure in the real world. He is out there now, proving himself with hands-on, real-life challenges — exactly the kind of environment where a fearless adventurer thrives. ⚙️ Completed: DevOps Path "Only time will prove his ability and his personality, but I believe in him to have a bright future. With real-life experience now under his belt, the fearless adventurer is just getting started." Inspired by Prabhat's Journey? Start your own learning adventure and join a community of passionate learners who support each other on the path to mastery. Explore DevOps Path Get in Touch

title: Rei Reltroner - Our First Learner | Skill-Wanderer
description: Meet Rei Reltroner, the first learner at Skill-Wanderer. Discover his journey of resilience, personal growth, and his pursuit of the QA/Tester path.
plainText:
← Back to Our Learners ⭐ First Learner Rei Reltroner (Raidan Malik Sandra) Sailing Through the Storm 📍 Indonesia 💼 Software Developer & Founder 🔗 LinkedIn The First Wanderer Rei holds a special place in our community as the very first learner and mentee to get in touch with Skill-Wanderer. As a true "student of life," Rei's journey has been defined by profound resilience. Navigating the complexities of ADHD and the mental "roller coasters" that life can present, Rei has shown what it means to truly sail through adversity. 🌟 A Personal & Professional Transformation Since beginning his mentorship journey, Rei has experienced a shift that goes far beyond technical skills. He has worked hard to improve his mental well-being and reclaim his confidence. 👥 Socially Active He has been going out more and meeting with more people, showing incredible personal growth and breaking through social barriers that once held him back. 🚀 Launching a Freelancing Career Marking a significant milestone, Rei has officially launched his freelancing career and secured his first project—a testament to his dedication and growing skills. 🏗️ Building the Future Even before connecting with Skill-Wanderer, Rei was already hard at work building his vision. Through our mentorship, we've been providing guidance and advice as he continues to develop: 🎨 Creative Studio Rei is developing his own Creative Studio, combining his technical skills with creative vision to build something uniquely his own. In Development Visit Site → 📊 Custom HRM System Building a Human Resource Management system from the ground up, showcasing his ability to tackle complex enterprise-level projects. In Development Visit Site → 📚 The Next Chapter: Quality & Excellence Rei continues to sharpen his technical edge through career mentorship, focusing on mastering the Tester/QA path . His commitment to constant learning and his courage to face personal challenges head-on make him the perfect embodiment of a Skill-Wanderer. 🔍 Currently pursuing: QA / Tester Path "Rei's story reminds us that growth isn't just about technical skills—it's about the courage to keep moving forward, even when the sea is rough." Inspired by Rei's Journey? Start your own learning adventure and join a community of passionate learners who support each other on the path to mastery. Explore QA / Tester Path Get in Touch
